steps.title: Find the date clue
steps.content:
The notes state that al‑Biruni published his landmass theory in 1037 CE.
This gives the exact year the student needs to specify.

steps.title: Match the date to the choices
steps.content:
Choice A includes both the year 1037 CE and the theory about a large landmass west of Europe and east of Asia, directly meeting the goal.
Choices B, C, and D either leave out the date of publication or fail to mention when the theory was published.
That matches choice A — A is correct.
